wrongif_alerts.wrongIf_e: New gaming approval freeze lasting >3 months OR revenue_growth < -5% for 2 consecutive quarters (consumption weakens proxy)

wrongif_alerts.note_z: 含二元事件条件，需人工核查：approval

wrongif_alerts.wrongIf_e: earnings_growth < -30% for 2 consecutive quarters OR Japan revenue contribution fails to reach 15% of total by Q4 2026
wrongif_alerts.wrongIf_z: 连续两季度盈利增速<-30%，或日本营收贡献未在2026年Q4前达到总收入15%
